pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Best Friend Bear 400%
pageContext.description: All you need is love!  Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick Best Friend Bear 400% Collectible Figure! From American greeting cards to the bright television screens in our homes, Care Bears have found a way to spread their love and happiness to friends around the world for generations.   Standing at approximately 11.02 inches tall, this lovely Be@rbrick has room in their heart just for you.  Care Bears fans, be sure to add the Secret Bear to your collection today!
